The slope of the given line y = (– 1) x – 7 is – 1.\nTherefore, using the condition of perpendicularity of lines, we have m × (– 1) = – 1\nor m = 1 (Why?)\nHence, the required equation of the line is y – 1 = (1) (x – 2) or y – 1 = x – 2 \n x –\ny – 1 = 0.",
